title: Sam Bankman-Fried loses appeal to overturn 25-year prison sentence
summary: A federal appeals court upheld the former FTX chief’s conviction, while his bid for clemency from President Donald Trump appears to face steep political odds.

summary: Bitcoin hit $64,000 as SpaceX launched a record-breaking IPO and US-Iran peace deal hopes continued to grow, but doubts over BTC price support remained.

title: From London to Sydney, Traders Ready to Watch SpaceX’s Debut
summary: Investors and retail traders from across the US and around the world were glued to their screens on Friday as Elon Musk’s SpaceX started trading in the stock market after the biggest initial public offering in Wall Street history.
